name: internship-tracking-system
description: Internship Tracking System - run server and client together

scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n SERVER,CLIENT -c blue,green "npm --prefix server run dev" "npm --prefix client run dev"
scripts.start: concurrently -k -n SERVER,CLIENT -c blue,green "npm --prefix server start" "npm --prefix client run dev"
scripts.install:all: npm install && npm --prefix server install && npm --prefix client install
